default_port.description: Specifies the default port for endpoints in the group, used when a port is not explicitly provided. Must be a valid port number between 1 and 65535.

description.description: Provides a description for the network endpoint group, detailing its purpose or usage.

name.description: Unique name of the network endpoint group, adhering to GCP naming conventions and limited to 63 characters.

network.description: Specifies the name of the network to which the endpoint group belongs; must be an existing network in the same project and region.

network_endpoint_type.description: Specifies the type of network endpoints in the group, such as `SERVERLESS`, `VM`, or `INTERNET_IP_PORT`.

subnetwork.description: Specifies the subnetwork to which the network endpoint group is connected; required if the network is a custom VPC.

timeouts.description: Defines the time duration for creating, updating, or deleting the network endpoint group, ensuring operations complete within the specified limits.

zone.description: Specifies the zone where the network endpoint group will be created, must match the location of the endpoints.
